Receives messages in the OLD format (compatible with existing HubBridgeOutbox) 2. Validates the message (remote app, domain) 3. Calls SecureSpokeVaultV3.releaseToUser() with the NEW security features 4. Optionally integrates with AnomalyDetector for monitoring  This allows you to deploy the secure vault WITHOUT modifying Hub
